# golden-project — `init.md` (project master guideline)

> **Purpose:** this is the entry point for the project's AI structure. Any person — or agent — working on this project reads it first. It defines the vision, conventions, the layout map and the references so work can start without ambiguity.
>
> Generated by `daedalus init`. Replace the placeholder sections with your project's specifics.

---

## 1. Vision & purpose

_Describe what **golden-project** is, the problem it solves and who it is for._ This section is a placeholder; fill it in with the project's brief.

---

## 2. Workspace structure (`.daedalus/`)

The canonical, backend-agnostic source of truth for this project's AI structure lives under `.daedalus/`:

```
.daedalus/
  daedalus.yaml        # manifest: name, backend(s), version, conventions
  init.md              # this project master guideline
  agents/              # backend-agnostic agent definitions (yaml + prompt md)
  prompts/             # global/shared prompts
  workflows/           # declarative DAG workflows (yaml)
  specs/               # spec / PRD
  architecture/        # architecture documents
  epics/               # epics
  tickets/             # tickets
  docs/                # derived documentation
  .state/              # progress state (git-tracked)
```

---

## 3. Conventions

- **Naming:** `kebab-case` for files/ids of epics, tickets, agents and workflows.
- **Markdown:** hierarchical headings, tables for metadata, code blocks for schemas/DAGs.
- **YAML:** stable, ordered keys (deterministic output, clean diffs).
- **Git:** branch per epic/ticket; descriptive commits; the backlog state is versioned.
- **Idempotency:** `build`/`sync` never destroys manual changes outside the managed area; it always offers a preview/diff.
- **Traceability:** every ticket references its epic; every epic references its source spec/architecture.

---

## 4. References

- `.daedalus/daedalus.yaml` — workspace manifest (name, version, backends, conventions).
- `.daedalus/specs/` — spec / PRD for this project.
- `.daedalus/workflows/` — declarative DAG workflows.
